quicksight.analysis.customfilterconfigur: A custom filter that filters based on a single value. This filter can be partially matched.

quicksight.analysis.customfilterconfigur.Description: The category value for the filter.  This field is mutually exclusive to `ParameterName`.
The match operator that is used to determine if a filter should be applied.
quicksight.analysis.customfilterconfigur.Allowed values: CONTAINS | DOES_NOT_CONTAIN | DOES_NOT_EQUAL | ENDS_WITH | EQUALS | STARTS_WITH

quicksight.analysis.customfilterconfigur.Description: This option determines how null values should be treated when filtering data.  +  `ALL_VALUES`: Include null values in filtered results.+  `NULLS_ONLY`: Only include null values in filtered results.+  `NON_NULLS_ONLY`: Exclude null values from filtered results.
The parameter whose value should be used for the filter value.  This field is mutually exclusive to `CategoryValue`.
Select all of the values. Null is not the assigned value of select all.  +  `FILTER_ALL_VALUES`
